revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG pixel-art game asset sprite sheet.

Use case: game-development pixel-art asset
Profile: snes16_platformer_v1
Preset: breakable_prop_32
Asset kind: field-prop
Asset type: prop
Canvas: exact 128x32 px sprite sheet, one row of four equal 32x32 px cells. The final image must be a single horizontal strip, 4:1 aspect ratio.
Grid: 1 row x 4 columns, but do not draw visible grid lines, cell separator lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, or watermarks.
Background: fill all empty space with perfectly flat solid #FF00FF magenta chroma key only, no gradients, no texture, no shadows on background.

Subject: a breakable cracked boulder for a bright mythical-Japan satoyama action RPG. Palette: cheerful muted matcha and moss greens, rounded grey stone, small moss patches, subtle vermilion-and-white accent charm marks only if they fit naturally on the boulder, not text or emblems. Top-left light source. Crisp low-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixel art, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, readable pixel clusters, one-pixel dark outline where useful.

Frame sequence, same scale and same centered ground position in every 32x32 cell:
Frame 1: rounded grey boulder with a visible white glowing crack and a little moss.
Frame 2: same boulder, crack widens, only a few small chips still close to the boulder.
Frame 3: boulder splitting into large connected chunks, no dust cloud, no tiny isolated specks.
Frame 4: only a compact small pile of rubble remains in the same position, clean readable chunks.

Containment and cleanup: every frame stays inside its own 32x32 cell with clear solid #FF00FF margin on all cell edges. Keep consistent identity and scale across frames. No detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no seam slivers, no dust specks, no leftover effect residue. Chips must be visibly attached to or immediately adjacent to the main boulder/chunks and must not float near cell edges.

Avoid: no existing franchise characters, logos, likenesses, or letter emblems; no humans, samurai armor, helmets, ninja outfits, weapons, guns, modern objects, UI, text, watermark, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, or extra objects.

Output style: crisp high-resolution rendering of exact low-resolution pixel art, with hard square pixels and a clean flat magenta chroma-key background filling all empty space.
